label: Architect: Discover
description: Inspect Ravi state across the 5 operational planes and capture the user's intent in a structured discovery artifact. Stage 1 of an architect run.

inputs.label: Goal trail
inputs.description: One of: sales | support | personal | curation | custom

inputs.label: User statement
inputs.description: Free-text statement from the user describing what they want Ravi to do.

inputs.label: Surfaces in use
inputs.description: Comma-separated channels (whatsapp, telegram, discord, matrix, email, etc).

inputs.label: Operator-in-the-loop level
inputs.description: One of: auto | review | manual. Defaults to review.

inputs.label: Architect run id
inputs.description: Stable id for the architect run this discovery belongs to.

completion.notes: Summarize the user's intent in their own words plus the consolidated 5-plane state snapshot.

progress.notes: Report after the state snapshot is collected and before drafting the discovery artifact.

templates.dispatch: [System] Execute: You are now Stage 1 (Discover) of architect run {{input.run_id}}. Inspect Ravi state via the 5-plane sequence documented in skill `ravi-system:contacts-manager`, then capture the user's intent. Output: {{artifacts.primary.path}} + {{task.taskDir}}/discovery.json.
templates.resume: [System] The daemon restarted. Continue architect discovery task {{task.id}} from where you stopped. Run id: {{input.run_id}}.
templates.dispatchSummary: Discover stage started for architect run {{input.run_id}} ({{input.goal_trail}}).
